author: stephanteig
description: Client workspace manager for Obsidian. Switch client spaces, create structured notes with frontmatter, and auto-generate client dashboards. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Brief

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new

- Rewrote README with full feature documentation, command reference, settings table, and shields.io badges

## Previous fixes (v1.0.1 – v1.0.2)
- Replaced deprecated `builtin-modules` package with Node.js built-in `node:module`
- Removed `!important` from CSS, replaced with scoped selectors
- Added artifact attestations for all three release assets
- Removed "Obsidian" from plugin description per community guidelines
- Added MIT license

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix artifact attestation — attest each release asset (main.js, manifest.json, styles.css) in a separate step so all three get verified provenance.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Maintenance release addressing Obsidian community plugin check findings.

- Remove dependency on `builtin-modules` — replaced with Node.js built-in `node:module`
- Remove `!important` from CSS rules, use scoped selectors instead
- Add README with feature overview and installation instructions
- Add artifact attestations to release assets

releases.author: stephanteig
releases.description:
Initial release of Brief — client workspace manager for Obsidian.

## Features
- **Client context switcher** — status bar, ribbon icon, fuzzy search modal with colored dots, per-client color picker
- **Note creator** — 3-step modal (title → type → details), 6 note types with tailored frontmatter, startup intercept notice, missing frontmatter warning
- **Side panel** — reactive dashboard controlling both modules, auto-generate and update client dashboards

## Install via BRAT
1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) from the community plugin store
2. In BRAT settings → Add beta plugin → `stephanteig/obsidian-brief`
3. Enable Brief in your plugin list
releases.name: Brief v1.0.0
